identity_baseline: An Earthman undergoing a supernatural transformation.
physical_build: agile and capable of high-intensity physical exertion.
movement_language: extreme agility, high-leaping capabilities, and earthly striking tactics (chin/stomach strikes).
stable_visual_summary: A transformed Earthman characterized by extreme physical agility and high-leaping capabilities suited for low gravity. The character exhibits a transition from a standard human state to a post-supernatural transformation state, initially appearing naked and unarmed but demonstrating high-intensity combat prowess through earthly striking tactics.
continuity_constraints: Character undergoes a supernatural transformation that leaves behind a "lifeless" physical shell.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific visual appearance of the post-transformation body beyond agility and combat style.
The specific clothing worn during combat/later chapters is unknown.
